news.headline: Abcourt Mines Inc. begins drilling campaign on Flordin Property with a minimum of 3,000m drilling, covering Cartwright and Flordin sectors.
news.summary: Abcourt Mines Inc. has initiated a drilling campaign on the Flordin Property in Rouyn-Noranda, Quebec. The company, listed on TSX Venture as ABI and OTCQB as ABMBF, announced the commencement of the campaign on Jan. 09, 2025. The initial phase of drilling will cover a minimum of 3,000 meters and will be conducted across two sectors of the property: the Cartwright sector and the Flordin sector.

news.headline: Hydreight Technologies updates shareholders on 2024 milestones and 2025 vision; CEO letter issued; traded on TSXV: NURS, OTCQB: HYDTF, FSE: SO6.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia and Las Vegas on January 9, 2025, Hydreight Technologies Inc. ("Hydreight" or the "Company") shared a communication with its shareholder partners from CEO Shane Madden. The Company, listed as TSXV: NURS, OTCQB: HYDTF, FSE: SO6, serves as a swiftly expanding mobile clinical network and medical platform.

news.headline: Host Hotels & Resorts on Dow Jones Sustainability World Index for 6th year, DJSI North America for 8th year. #GlobalSustainabilityLeader
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland on January 09, 2025, Host Hotels & Resorts, Inc. (NASDAQ: HST), the largest lodging real estate investment trust in the US, has been recognized on the Dow Jones Sustainability World Index (DJSI World) for the sixth year in a row, reaffirming its status as a leader in global sustainability. The company has also secured a spot on the DJSI North America for the eighth consecutive year, showcasing its commitment to sustainability in the region.

news.headline: Check out Bloomberg news for latest report on how hacking the microbiome can aid in cancer treatment.
Subsea7 awarded contract by Equinor for FEED study for Fram Sør project offshore Norway. Oslo Børs: SUBC, ADR: SUBCY.
news.summary: Luxembourg, January 9, 2025 - Subsea 7 S.A. disclosed that they have secured a contract from Equinor to conduct a front-end engineering and design (FEED) study, including an Engineering, Procurement, Construction, and Installation (EPCI) option, for the Fram Sør development project situated offshore in Norway. The contract involves detailed planning for the project and is a significant step forward in the development process. Subsea 7 S.A., listed on Oslo Børs as SUBC and ADR as SUBCY, continues to expand its portfolio in the offshore energy sector with this venture.

news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs' first year brings high returns but also volatility, with billions in trading volume. Mixed signals a year later.
news.summary: Bitcoin ETFs, including the Grayscale Bitcoin Trust (NYSE:GBTC) and iShares Bitcoin Trust (NYSE:IBIT), celebrated their one-year anniversary on U.S. exchanges after a tumultuous journey mirroring the volatility of the crypto market. Launched on Jan. 11, 2024, these ETFs saw explosive debuts with tens of millions of shares traded on their first day, resulting in billions of dollars in combined trading volumes. However, the initial excitement was dampened by Bitcoin's erratic price movements, with GBTC closing up by a modest 0.5% and IBIT dropping over 4% after an early rally. As they mark their anniversary, these ETFs continue to keep investors on edge amid ongoing market fluctuations. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures drop, Nvidia falls; U.S. markets closed. Nvidia dips due to AI chip restrictions.
news.summary: The U.S. stock markets were closed to honor Carter's funeral, leading to a halt in trading activities. Nvidia experienced a decline overnight following reports of restrictions on new artificial intelligence chip developments. Dow Jones futures showed a drop while Nvidia stocks dipped. Additionally, companies like IonQ, Rigetti, and SoundHound saw a decrease in their market value.

news.headline: Disclosure under French law L.233-8-II & AR.223-16, made by company according to Autorité des Marchés Financiers regulations.
EQT to acquire Scale Microgrids, marking second strategic investment in a month using EQT's balance sheet.
news.summary: EQT Transition Infrastructure strategy recently completed its second targeted investment in the past month. The acquisition was funded using capital from EQT's balance sheet. Scale Microgrids, the company acquired in this transaction, is a vertically integrated energy firm involved in designing, constructing, financing, owning, and managing energy infrastructure. This move highlights EQT's focus on strategic investments in the infrastructure sector.

news.headline: Rocketlane announces Propel25 event on May 14-15 in San Francisco for service delivery transformation.
news.summary: Rocketlane, a company based in San Jose, California, has recently revealed that Propel, their premier conference, is set to make a comeback on May 14-15 in San Francisco. The event aims to gather professionals in the Professional Services and delivery industries.

news.headline: Backpack Exchange disputes FTX EU ownership, sparking clash with FTX estate over ownership rights.
news.summary: The ownership of FTX EU is currently being disputed between Backpack Exchange and the FTX estate.

news.headline: NMMA reports decline of 9%-12% in 2024 U.S. powerboat sales to 230,000-240,000 units amid post-COVID normalization.
news.summary: In Washington, the National Marine Manufacturers Association (NMMA), known for representing around 85% of the U.S. recreational boat, marine engine, and accessory market, announced a decrease in total new powerboat retail unit sales for 2024. The decline is estimated at 9%-12%, bringing the total sales to approximately 230,000-240,000 units in the U.S. The industry has been steadily regaining stability after experiencing heightened demand during the COVID pandemic. However, challenges such as inflationary pressures and risks have characterized the market throughout the year.

news.headline: Kvika banki hf.'s Nomination Committee is inviting nominations for the Board of Directors.
news.summary: The Nomination Committee of Kvika banki hf. (referred to as "Kvika" or "the Company") is now accepting nominations and candidacies for the Board of Directors. Those interested are encouraged to submit their applications to the Committee for consideration.

news.headline: Bamboo Rose launches TotalPLM at NRF 2025: Retail's Big Show in NYC, Jan 12-14. Comprehensive platform with AI integration.
news.summary: TotalPLM is set to make its first appearance at NRF 2025: Retail's Big Show in New York City from January 12-14. The announcement was made in Boston on January 9, 2025. Bamboo Rose, a prominent enterprise software solutions provider for retail, unveiled their strategic product transformation with TotalPLM™, marking a significant development for the company.

news.headline: Biofidelity and CellCarta team up to use Aspyre® Lung in worldwide clinical trials, announced on Jan. 9, 2025.
news.summary: In Cambridge, UK, and Montreal, a partnership was announced on Jan. 9, 2025, between Biofidelity, known for pioneering genomic solutions, and CellCarta, a leading global contract research organization (CRO) favored by biopharmaceutical firms for precision medicine services. This collaboration marks a significant step forward in delivering cutting-edge solutions to the biopharmaceutical sector.

news.headline: VideoShops, launched on August 20, 2024, aims to revolutionize social commerce by democratizing affiliate retail.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, a new player in the social commerce scene, VideoShops, emerged. Launched on August 20, 2024, this platform aims to rival popular apps like TikTok and Amazon. VideoShops is revolutionizing affiliate retail, providing a space for users to share their favorite products. With its rapid growth and wide appeal, it is positioned to become the go-to platform for social commerce enthusiasts.

news.headline: Los Angeles wildfires cause $57 billion in damages, contributing to a series of climate disasters impacting locals and businesses.
news.summary: The latest reports indicate that the damages caused by the wildfires have surged to an estimated $57 billion. These fires are just the latest in a series of climate-driven disasters impacting both businesses and individuals who own homes.

news.headline: Lebanon elects US-backed President Aoun, signaling shift from Iran influence.
CES 2025: CASBOT reveals full-size humanoid robot "CASBOT 01" at Las Vegas event, showcasing advanced capabilities.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on Jan. 9, 2025, CASBOT, a top humanoid robot brand, unveiled its latest innovation at the 2025 CES show which took place from January 7 to 10. The showcased robot, CASBOT 01, stands as a full-size biped humanoid with cutting-edge bionic design and high-level dynamic force control features.

news.headline: World's largest indoor pickleball entity, Pickleball Kingdom, opens in Dallas, TX at 14060 Dallas Pkwy, Suite D, 75240.
news.summary: A premier pickleball facility, Pickleball Kingdom, has unveiled its latest location in Dallas, Texas on January 9, 2025. Located at 14060 Dallas Pkwy, Suite D, Dallas, TX 75240, this new addition marks the largest indoor pickleball entity globally. The cutting-edge establishment is set to offer top-notch amenities and services to pickleball enthusiasts in the region.

news.headline: Sentinel Trust Company promotes 4 senior officers - Damon Drouet, Kelsey Gray, Julie McCaughey, Scott Snyder.
news.summary: In Houston on January 9, 2025, Sentinel Trust Company, LBA, a wealth management firm and multi-family office, disclosed several key promotions. Damon L. Drouet, MBA, was promoted alongside Kelsey W. Gray, JD; Julie A. McCaughey, JD; and Scott E. Snyder, CFA®, MBA, CAIA. This announcement marks a significant development for the company as they continue to strengthen their leadership team.

news.headline: Amentum wins $447 million Air Forces GPMS contract for prepositioned asset management services to ensure mission readiness.
news.summary: Amentum, a prominent player in innovative engineering and technology solutions, has secured the Air Forces Central Command GPMS contract worth $447 million in Chantilly, Virginia. This contract includes providing and updating prepositioned storage and maintenance solutions to ensure mission readiness on a large scale. With this achievement, Amentum showcases its proficiency in offering intelligent asset management solutions that enhance efficiency and prolong asset lifespan.

news.headline: Anumana appoints Dr. Simos Kedikoglou as President & COO in Cambridge, Mass.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, Anumana has appointed Dr. Simos Kedikoglou as the new President and Chief Operating Officer (COO). This announcement comes into effect immediately.

news.headline: Christie's and Sotheby's shift focus as art sales decline. They now prioritize luxury items like handbags and cars.
news.summary: Sotheby’s and Christie’s, two major auction houses, are adapting to a decrease in both the supply and demand for high-value art pieces. In response, they are shifting their focus towards selling luxury handbags, classic cars, and unique experiences. This change in strategy showcases their efforts to diversify their offerings to stay profitable amidst the current market conditions.

news.headline: Independence Realty Trust increases unsecured credit facility from $500M to $750M, extending maturity to Jan 2029.
news.summary: On January 8, 2025, Independence Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: IRT) revealed that its operating partnership, Independence Realty Operating Partnership, LP, had entered into an amended unsecured credit facility. The updated agreement boosts the borrowing capacity from $500 million to $750 million, and extends the revolver's maturity date to January 2029, compared to the previous date of January 2026. At the time of the announcement, the outstanding balance under the revolver was not disclosed.

news.headline: MidOcean invests $197.5 million in EquipmentShare in a $797.5 million sale-leaseback deal.
news.summary: New York-based MidOcean Partners revealed today their leadership in a $197.5 million structured equity investment in OWN Equipment Fund I LLC, a special-purpose vehicle. The investment facilitated a substantial $797.5 million sale-leaseback deal with EquipmentShare.com Inc., a prominent construction equipment company. MidOcean is known for its expertise in middle-market private equity, alternative credit, and structured capital management.

news.headline: Goodyear appoints Don Metzelaar as Senior VP Global Manufacturing & Supply Chain, starting Jan 13. Stock: GT (NASDAQ)
news.summary: Akron, Ohio - On January 9, 2025, the Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company (NASDAQ: GT) revealed the appointment of Don Metzelaar as the new Senior Vice President for Global Manufacturing and Supply Chain. He will report directly to CEO and President Mark Stewart starting from January 13th.

news.headline: Inspire Medical Systems sees price performance improvement, IBD rating upgrade from 72 to 81, driving big gains.
news.summary: Inspire Medical Systems has demonstrated a positive trend in price performance, leading to an upgrade of its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 72 to 81. The company's advancements in sleep innovations have resulted in significant gains.

news.headline: Biotech stocks anticipate growth in 2025 driven by weight-loss drugs, AI advancements, and potential return of Trump presidency.
news.summary: In the year 2025, significant developments are expected in biotech stocks as experts anticipate the emergence of new weight-loss medications, the influence of artificial intelligence (AI), and the potential for Donald Trump's return to presidency for a second term. These factors are seen as key catalysts shaping the trajectory of biotech stocks in the upcoming year. Investors are closely monitoring these trends as they project potential growth and opportunities in the sector.

news.headline: Eli Lilly stock trading below key moving averages post Zepbound's approval for weight-loss drug. Is LLY stock a buy?
news.summary: Eli Lilly's stock is currently trading below its important moving averages. However, the company's weight-loss drug Zepbound has recently received a new approval, which may impact their stock performance. Investors are questioning whether now is a good time to buy or sell Eli Lilly's stock.

news.headline: Redfin reports a 2% increase in home tours in early 2025, but sales have not increased correspondingly.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report from Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN) indicates a rise in homebuyer activity at the start of the new year. The Homebuyer Demand Index, which tracks tours and purchasing services by Redfin agents, saw a modest 2% uptick compared to the previous month, for the week ending January 5. Moreover, it shows a 2% increase compared to the same time last year. The data suggests a growing interest among house hunters.

news.headline: Montecito Medical recognized as key influencer in healthcare real estate for 7th year by Real Estate Forum and Globe St.
news.summary: Montecito Medical has been recognized as a significant player in healthcare real estate, receiving the title of “Key Influencer” for the seventh year in a row. This prestigious acknowledgment was granted by Real Estate Forum and GlobeSt. Partners, renowned publishers in the real estate industry. Each year, the publishers compile a list of influencers across various sectors including healthcare, retail, industrial, and multifamily housing. Montecito's consistent recognition underscores its prominent role in the healthcare real estate sector.

news.headline: Bridget Hall of ACI Worldwide named one of American Banker's Most Influential Women in Payments for 2025.
news.summary: ACI Worldwide, a global payments technology company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol ACIW, based in Omaha, Nebraska, declared today that Bridget Hall, who serves as the Leader of Real-Time Payments for the Americas, has been recognized as one of American Banker’s Most Influential Women in Payments for the year 2025. This accolade honors female leaders who are making significant contributions to the payments sector and driving progress within the financial services field. The award spotlights individuals who have made noteworthy impacts and advancements within the industry.

news.headline: Meal Kit Delivery Market Report: Analysis of top companies like HelloFresh, Blue Apron. Market to show growth in 2025-2030.
news.summary: A new report titled "Meal Kit Delivery Market (2024 Edition)" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report analyzes the market based on offering type (Heat and Eat, Cook and Eat), demography, sales channel (Online, Offline), region, and country, providing insights and forecasts for the period from 2020 to 2030. The analysis covers historical data from 2020-2023, estimates for 2024, and forecasts up to 2030. The Global Meal Kit Delivery market exhibited growth during this period.

news.headline: Plethy and VBW are partnering to innovate MSK healthcare by leveraging data; aims to empower patients and improve outcomes.
news.summary: In San Jose, California on January 9, 2025, Plethy, Inc., a prominent digital health company, has joined forces with the aim of addressing the dynamic Musculoskeletal (MSK) healthcare sector. This sector requires inventive and economical approaches to enhance patient empowerment and enhance results.

news.headline: Cemvita expands to Brazil, establishing a new subsidiary in the country. Leading in circular bioeconomy.
news.summary: Houston-based company Cemvita, a leader in circular bioeconomy, has recently expanded its operations into Brazil, a significant move in reshaping the world's energy sector. To enhance its footprint in the region, Cemvita has set up a new subsidiary in Brazil, showcasing its dedication to the Brazilian market and emphasizing the strategic value of this expansion. By forging new partnerships and collaborations, Cemvita is reinforcing its position in the market and paving the way for further growth opportunities.

news.headline: IO Biotech finishes enrolling patients in Phase 2 trial of IO102-IO103, a therapeutic cancer vaccine for resectable melanoma or head and neck cancer.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been stated that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached an all-time high of 10,000 in a single day. Along with this, the death toll has also increased, with over 500 fatalities recorded in the past week. These alarming figures highlight the urgency of following safety guidelines and getting vaccinated to curb the spread of the virus. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to preventive measures such as mask-wearing, social distancing, and frequent hand washing to protect themselves and others. The healthcare system is under strain with hospitals reaching full capacity, emphasizing the need for collective efforts to combat the ongoing pandemic.

news.headline: AI Unlimited Group reveals 2025 vision for integrated AI ecosystem focusing on user empowerment with AI solutions.
news.summary: AI Unlimited Group (AIUG) is transforming user empowerment with cutting-edge integrated AI solutions. With an impressive range of products and services, AIUG is revolutionizing the industry by providing advanced AI technologies to empower users worldwide. The company's innovative approach has garnered significant attention, with a growing user base of over 1 million customers globally. AIUG's commitment to enhancing user experience through AI integration is evident in its continuous growth and success in the market.

news.headline: Sen-Jam Pharmaceutical patents new approach to tackle obesity and metabolic disorders; introduces novel composition.
news.summary: In Huntington, New York, on January 9, 2025, Sen-Jam Pharmaceutical unveiled a cutting-edge patent application aimed at addressing obesity and metabolic disorders. The patent introduces a unique composition and method designed to target these health concerns. Sen-Jam Pharmaceutical, known for its innovative anti-inflammatory solutions, is at the forefront of this initiative. This development reflects the company's commitment to advancing healthcare.

news.headline: INOVIO outlines 2025 goals and 2024 achievements in DNA medicine development, with focus on HPV and infectious diseases.
news.summary: In Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania on January 9, 2025, INOVIO, a biotechnology firm traded on NASDAQ under the symbol INO, is concentrating on the creation and distribution of DNA medicines to combat HPV-related illnesses, cancer, and infectious diseases. The company has recently emphasized upcoming milestones in their development efforts.

news.headline: Nipocalimab gets U.S. FDA Priority Review for myasthenia gravis treatment after Phase 3 study showing disease control over 24 weeks in antibody-positive adults. Jan 9, 2025.
news.summary: The Biologics License Application has been approved based on the findings of the Phase 3 Vivacity-MG3 study. The study revealed that there was consistent disease management for a period of 24 weeks among a diverse group of adult patients who tested positive for antibodies such as anti-AChR, anti-MuSK, and anti-LRP4. The results showcased the effectiveness of the treatment in controlling the disease in a wide range of patients. This significant development took place in Spring House, Pennsylvania on January 9, 2025.

news.headline: IACMI commemorates 10 years of innovation, economic growth, and enhancing US advanced manufacturing, a DOE initiative from 2015.
news.summary: Founded in 2015 by the Department of Energy, the Institute for Advanced Composites Manufacturing Innovation (IACMI) has positioned itself as a key player in advanced composites and workforce strategies, contributing to the growth of American manufacturing and national defense. Based in Knoxville, Tennessee, as of January 9, 2025, IACMI continues to make significant strides in these areas, playing a pivotal role in these crucial sectors.

news.headline: Dutch inventor creates method to remove CO2 using olivine, music, and bubbles in minutes. Breakthrough in climate change.
news.summary: The Netherlands' Ap Verheggen, a Dutch inventor, has unveiled a groundbreaking method in The Hague on Jan. 9, 2025, to address climate change. The innovative technique involves rapidly extracting CO2 from the atmosphere, a process that typically takes decades, within minutes. Verheggen's collaboration with a startup has propelled the project forward, marking a fusion of art, science, and music to combat environmental challenges. This development offers a promising solution to reduce carbon emissions and mitigate the effects of global warming at an accelerated pace.

news.headline: Prudentia Sciences starts with $7M funding to revolutionize life sciences marketplace for dealmaking in Cambridge.
news.summary: A new company, Prudentia Sciences, has been established in Cambridge, Massachusetts with a substantial $7 million in funding aimed at revolutionizing the life sciences industry for dealmaking. This funding is intended to support their efforts in transforming the marketplace for life sciences transactions.

news.headline: Rigel's drug R289 granted Orphan Drug designation by FDA for MDS, a commercial stage company focused on hematologic disorders.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Rigel Pharmaceuticals, a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol RIGL and headquartered in South San Francisco, revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has awarded their drug Orphan Drug status. Rigel Pharmaceuticals is dedicated to addressing hematologic disorders and cancer in their commercial operations.

news.headline: Gene therapy pioneer Jim Wilson praises iECURE's clinical response for ECUR-506, emphasizing modern science and persistence.
news.summary: In a statement released from Philadelphia on January 9, 2025, Dr. Jim Wilson, President and CEO of GEMMA Biotherapeutics (GEMMABio) and co-founder of iECURE, highlighted the significant impact of contemporary scientific advancements and the value of perseverance. The company's recent declaration showcases this sentiment, emphasizing the formidable capabilities of present-day scientific endeavors. The numbers involved in this announcement underline the groundbreaking nature of the developments undertaken by GEMMA Biotherapeutics and iECURE, affirming the profound achievements made possible through dedicated research and exploration in the field.

news.headline: Commercial Contracting Corporation based in Auburn Hills, Michigan, acquires Industrial Maintenance Specialists, expanding presence in Indiana.
news.summary: Auburn Hills, Michigan - On January 9, 2025, Commercial Contracting Corporation (CCC), a General Contractor and Equipment Installation company in Auburn Hills, initiated the acquisition of Industrial Maintenance Specialists. CCC, a self-performing firm, is based in Auburn Hills and holds a strong presence in the industry. This move signifies a significant development in CCC's growth strategy and strengthens its position in the market.

news.headline: Uniti Group Inc. launches fiber securitization notes offering worth $589 million, anticipated repayment in April 2030.
news.summary: Little Rock, Arkansas - On January 9, 2025, Uniti Group Inc. (Nasdaq: UNIT) announced that its subsidiaries, Uniti Fiber ABS Issuer LLC and Uniti Fiber TRS Issuer LLC, are starting an offering of $589,000,000 in secured fiber network revenue term notes. The Notes are set to mature in April 2030 and will be backed by specific fiber network assets and customer contracts in Florida, as well as the Gulf Coast region spanning Louisiana, Mississippi, and Alabama. These entities have been classified as "unrestricted subsidiaries" under Uniti's credit agreement and existing senior notes indentures.

news.headline: iECURE reports complete clinical response in infant with ECUR-506 for OTC deficiency. First dosed in OTC-HOPE study.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, iECURE, Inc., a gene editing firm, shared early results from the initial infant participant in their OTC-HOPE Phase 1/2 trial of ECUR-506. This experimental treatment aims to address neonatal onset ornithine transcarbamylase (OTC) deficiency, a serious liver disorder lacking effective therapies. The preliminary findings suggest that ECUR-506 was generally well received by the patient. iECURE is focusing on mutation-agnostic in vivo gene insertion therapies for liver disorders.

news.headline: No-cost heart & kidney screenings in Orlando to detect dangerous cholesterol, including Lp(a); screening includes other related risks.
news.summary: A health event in Orlando, Florida is providing free Lp(a) testing along with screenings for other metabolism and kidney-related risks. The Heart & Kidney Health Screening is offering these services at no cost.
